title: 2 Cagliari - 2 Cala Gonone - 2 Alghero - 1 Olbia

hotels.hotel_3star: Club Esse Cala Gonone Beach Village

car_hire.description: One-way rental car, Cagliari to Olbia

services.description: Arrive Cagliari, pickup rental car at airport. One-way fee payable €75~

day_descriptions.Day 1: Arrive Cagliari, collect your one-way rental car. Explore the Castello district, Bastione Saint Remy and the harbour. Overnight Cagliari.
day_descriptions.Day 2: Visit Villasimius and its marine park. Afternoon at Cala Sinzias or Punta Molentis beach. Overnight Cagliari.
day_descriptions.Day 3: Drive the spectacular SS125 east coast to Cala Gonone. Photo stops at Arbatax's red rocks and the Baunei viewpoint. Overnight Cala Gonone.
day_descriptions.Day 4: Boat excursion into the Gulf of Orosei — sea caves, hidden beaches and turquoise water only reachable by sea. Overnight Cala Gonone.
day_descriptions.Day 5: Drive to Alghero via Bosa along the spectacular coastal road. En route: the Nuraghe Nuraddeo Bronze Age site and Bosa castle. Evening in Alghero's Spanish old town. Overnight Alghero.
day_descriptions.Day 6: Day at leisure in Alghero. Neptune's Grotto by boat or the 654 steps. Optional dolphin watching tour. Overnight Alghero.
day_descriptions.Day 7: Drive to Olbia via the Costa Smeralda. En route: Castelsardo, Porto Cervo harbour, Spiaggia del Principe beach. Overnight Olbia.
day_descriptions.Day 8: Proceed to Olbia airport. Drop off rental car.

optionals.description: Boat excursion, Marine Park of Villasimius, 3 hrs
Boat excursion, Gulf of Orosei, 7 hrs
Alghero ticket (13 attractions inc Neptune's cave)

description: Sardinia's wild east coast, the Gulf of Orosei's sea caves, Alghero's Spanish old town and the Costa Smeralda on a week-long self-drive island circuit.
